headline: Top features of
subtitle: A controlled, Moodle-native video activity with server-validated tracking — heatmaps, signed-URL protection, cloud sources, branded skins, and audit-ready exports.
shortDescription: A controlled, Moodle-native video activity with server-validated tracking, engagement heatmaps, signed-URL protection and audit-ready reports.
intro: Modern Video Player turns an ordinary video into a controlled, Moodle-native activity with playback that is validated on the server — so completion and watch-time actually mean something.

On that foundation it adds engagement heatmaps and a cohort analytics dashboard, signed-URL delivery with dynamic watermarking, cloud and provider sources, seven branded player skins, learner aids like resume, chapters, transcript and captions, and audit-ready exports — all GPLv3 and upgradeable from the free Community edition in place.

demo.note: Shared demo accounts — please don't change the passwords.

guarantee.alt: 30-day money-back guarantee — try it for 30 days; if it doesn't work as described and our support can't resolve it, we'll refund 100%

featuregroups.heading: Playback & integrity
items: Server-validated watch-time and max-verified position
Forward-seek guard with configurable grace seconds
Heartbeat tracking and suspicious-seek integrity flags
Force server-side validation

featuregroups.heading: Completion & grading
items: Complete by watched percentage or validated end-of-video
Configurable required watch percentage (default 95%)
Gradebook integration with a grade-to-pass threshold

featuregroups.heading: Learner experience
items: Resume exactly where the learner left off
Clickable WebVTT chapter markers and chapter list
Searchable transcript panel with optional download
Multi-language WebVTT captions
Learner bookmarks with labels
Adjustable playback speed (with a max-speed cap), rewind and fullscreen
Autoplay (off / muted / unmuted with fallback) and poster image
Next-activity overlay — replay or continue to the next activity
Keyboard shortcuts with a shortcuts-help dialog

featuregroups.heading: Engagement analytics
items: Per-activity engagement heatmap and audience-retention curve
Viewers-per-moment with drop-off and rewatch peaks
Site-level cohort dashboard aggregating every activity, with a cohort filter
Scheduled engagement digests emailed to instructors

featuregroups.heading: Compliance & audit
items: Full audit export as CSV, JSON, Excel or ODS
Per-learner integrity records and validated watched segments

featuregroups.heading: Content protection
items: Dynamic name/email watermark overlay
Screen-capture deterrence with a tamper-evident audit log
Signed, user-bound video URLs that expire

featuregroups.heading: Sources & delivery
items: File upload, external direct URL (MP4/WebM), YouTube and Vimeo
Cloud storage: S3-compatible (AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Wasabi, Spaces, B2, MinIO) and Azure Blob
Short-lived signed delivery from your own bucket
Admin source-policy guardrails

featuregroups.heading: Appearance
items: Seven player styles: YouTube, Vimeo, Netflix, Plyr, Apple, Classic and Minimal
Per-activity style choice with an admin-set default
Configurable title position and control-text toggle

featuregroups.heading: Focus mode
items: Hide navigation, course index and right blocks during playback
Block Picture-in-Picture and skip shortcuts
Auto-pause when the browser tab is hidden

featuregroups.heading: Standards & integration
items: xAPI statements (initialized, completed, flagged) to any LRS
LTI 1.3 Advantage publishing via core enrol_lti
Activity events and logs for clean reporting

featuregroups.heading: Platform & trust
items: Moodle 4.5–5.2, GPLv3
Privacy API (GDPR) — declares every learner data point stored
Full backup and restore of activities, files and progress
Open-core: upgrade the free Community edition in place

image: Optional hero image: the Modern Video Player playing inside a Moodle course, or a clean montage of the player + an engagement heatmap. Keep it on-brand (deep navy / blue).

title: Server-validated playback
checks: Watch-time and max-verified position computed on the server
Forward-seek guard with configurable grace seconds
Heartbeat tracking with suspicious-seek integrity flags
image: Screenshot of the Modern Video Player open in a course: the video stage with custom controls and the progress/seek bar. Capture /mod/modernvideoplayer/view.php?id=<cmid> (#region-main). 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Tamper-proof completion & grading
checks: Complete by watched percentage or validated end-of-video
Required watch % (default 95), enforced server-side
Gradebook integration with a grade-to-pass threshold
image: Screenshot of the activity Completion conditions (watched % vs validated end + required percentage) and, ideally, the grading / grade-to-pass fields. Capture the Completion + Grade fieldsets on /course/modedit.php.

title: Engagement heatmap
checks: Audience-retention curve per activity from validated segments
Viewers-per-moment with drop-off and rewatch peaks
See exactly where attention is lost
image: Screenshot of the per-activity engagement heatmap / audience-retention report: the retention curve with drop-off and rewatch peaks. Capture /mod/modernvideoplayer/heatmap.php?id=<cmid>.

title: Cohort analytics dashboard
checks: Site-level Video engagement dashboard under Reports
Aggregates validated engagement across every activity
Optional cohort filter
image: Screenshot of the site-level Video engagement dashboard (Site administration > Reports) showing the cohort filter and aggregate stats/chart. Capture /mod/modernvideoplayer/dashboard.php.

title: Compliance audit & scheduled reports
checks: Full audit trail as CSV, JSON, Excel or ODS
Per-learner integrity records plus validated watched segments
Scheduled engagement digests emailed to instructors
image: Screenshot of the activity report page with the audit export panel (CSV / JSON / Excel / ODS) and the learner integrity records table. Capture /mod/modernvideoplayer/report.php?id=<cmid>. (Optionally show the scheduled-task setting.)

title: Built-in content protection
checks: Dynamic name/email watermark to deter re-sharing
Screen-capture deterrence with a tamper-evident log
Signed, user-bound URLs that expire
image: Screenshot of the player showing the dynamic name/email watermark overlay on the video (enable watermark on the activity first). Alternatively the content-protection admin settings. Capture /mod/modernvideoplayer/view.php?id=<cmid>.

title: Built for learners
checks: Resume exactly where they left off
Clickable chapters, searchable transcript and multi-language captions
Bookmarks, adjustable speed and a next-activity overlay
image: Screenshot of the player with learner aids visible: the resume prompt, the chapter list, or the transcript/captions panel open. Capture /mod/modernvideoplayer/view.php?id=<cmid> with chapters + captions uploaded.

title: Seven player styles
checks: YouTube, Vimeo, Netflix, Plyr, Apple, Classic and Minimal skins
Same tracking and enforcement across every style
Choose the style per activity
image: Screenshot of the player-style selector listing the seven skins (YouTube, Vimeo, Netflix, Plyr, Apple, Classic, Minimal) — the admin default-style dropdown or the activity appearance setting. A small montage of two contrasting skins also works well.

title: Flexible video sources
checks: Upload, external URL, YouTube/Vimeo, or cloud storage
S3-compatible (S3, R2, Wasabi, Spaces, B2, MinIO) plus Azure Blob
Short-lived signed delivery from your own bucket
image: Screenshot of the activity Video settings source picker: upload / external URL / YouTube-Vimeo / cloud (S3 / Azure). Capture the Video settings fieldset on /course/modedit.php.

title: Distraction-free focus mode
checks: Hide navigation, course index and right blocks during playback
Picture-in-Picture and skip shortcuts blocked
Auto-pause when the browser tab is hidden
image: Screenshot of the player in focus mode: navigation, course index and right blocks hidden so only the video is on screen. Capture /mod/modernvideoplayer/view.php?id=<cmid>&focus=1.

title: Standards & integration
checks: xAPI statements (initialized, completed, flagged) to any LRS
One-click LTI Advantage publishing via core enrol_lti
Keyboard shortcuts, events and logs for clean reporting
image: Screenshot of the Standards & integration admin settings: the xAPI / LRS endpoint fields and the LTI Advantage publishing toggle. Capture /admin/settings.php?section=modsettingmodernvideoplayer (the standards section).

title: Trusted & compliant

Full backup & restore of activities, files and progress
GPLv3 open-core: upgrade the free Community edition in place
image: Screenshot of the plugin's Privacy registry entry (Site administration > Users > Privacy and policies > Plugin privacy registry > mod_modernvideoplayer), or a simple on-brand trust graphic (GPLv3 · GDPR · Backup/restore).
